text.title: Vision Basics — Procedure
text.summary: 6-step procedure for a typed VLM extraction: validate → resize → encode → cache probe → call with json_object → parse with retry.

step.name: validate-input
step.input: image path or URL, target provider
step.action: Check format in {jpeg, png, webp, gif}. For URLs, HEAD to verify size + reachability. For local paths, check size against per-provider cap (5 MB Anthropic, 20 MB OpenAI / Gemini).

step.name: encode
step.action: If sensitive → base64 encode + record media_type. Else → keep URL for URL-input mode.

step.name: cache-probe
step.action: cache_key = sha256(image_bytes + task_prompt + provider + model); read `{cache_dir}/{cache_key}.json`; if present, return cached=true.

step.name: vlm-call
step.input: encoded image, task prompt with JSON schema, provider, model, detail level
step.action: OpenAI: `response_format={"type": "json_object"}` + schema in prompt. Anthropic: schema in prompt + prefill `{`. Gemini: schema in prompt. Set detail="low" for classification, "high" for dense text.

step.name: parse-with-retry
step.action: Try `json.loads()` → `Model(**data)`. On JSONDecodeError or ValidationError, re-prompt with the error message and the schema. Cap at 2 retries.
step.output: validated Pydantic instance OR status="error" if retry budget exhausted.
